prompt.content:
Please upload the organisation hierarchy, along with cost centres, movements, and locations, to Workday using the attached data. 

Once done, add the recommended hire for the COO position to the organisation using the same CC, org, profile ID as WRK-002. The worker ID for the recommended hire would be WRK-201, and the hire date would be 26 Jan 2026. Then, using the list workers tool, provide the number of active employees in CC-001 as of 27 Jan 2026.

Please provide all your answers directly in the console. Use the username: hr_admin and password: hr_admin for access.

rubrics.name: States that the worker ID for the recommended hire is WRK-201 (ver_38990c990994408d8d03e99d894b2cd7)

messages.content: States that the worker ID for the recommended hire is WRK-201.

rubrics.name: States that the hire date for the hired employee is 26 Jan 2026 (acceptable... (ver_df2333987ce84f088f81629f470a0cf2)

messages.content: States that the hire date for the hired employee is 26 Jan 2026 (acceptable range 25.7 to 26.3).

rubrics.name: States that the number of active workers in CC-001 as of 27th Jan 2026 is 20 (ver_72b87ceb511d4a8cb47d7795602f30c1)

messages.content: States that the number of active workers in CC-001 as of 27th Jan 2026 is 20.

golden_responses.golden_text_response:
Hired `WRK-201` with the hire date `2026-01-26`.utilizing the data for `WRK-002` Org ID: `ORG-001`, Cost Center ID: `CC-001`, Job Profile ID: `JP-EXEC-003`.

The number of active employees in CC-001 as of 27 Jan 2026 is 20
